name: Fade Gida Yatirim Sanayi Ticaret Anonim Sirketi
summary: Fade Gida Yatirim Sanayi Ticaret Anonim Sirketi engages in the food business. The company provides salted/sulphured sun dried tomatoes. It sells its organic products to its customers worldwide. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in Izmir, Turkey.
